NOTE: Do NOT manually edit this file. This file is automatically updated when semantic release (release.yml) runs.

patches.name: Bypass Samsung Account signature check
patches.description: Replaces com.osp.app.signin with com.notsamsung.dummy in dex (same as PC patcher). Use with the SamsungPatch keystore. If on-device patching loops or OOMs, patch on a PC instead.

patches.name: Disable Knox integrity checks
patches.description: Bypass Knox, root, warranty bit, and SAK checks so Samsung Health runs on Knox-tripped devices (0x1) without root.
